biological_replicate: ccRCC tissues and peri‐tumor tissues were obtained from patients who underwent surgery at the First Affiliated Hospital, Sun Yat‐sen University (FAH‐SYSU; Guangzhou, Guangdong, China) in 2021
technical_replicate: Each experiment was performed in triplicate
experimental_design: To explore the potential role of MFN2 in ccRCC development
factor_value: MFN2 was down‐regulated in ccRCC and associated with favorable prognosis of ccRCC patients
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: Each experiment was performed in triplicate
number_of_biological_replicates: 150 patients pathologically diagnosed with primary ccRCC
number_of_samples: 150 patients pathologically diagnosed with primary ccRCC
